brief_justification: Correct answer (Yes) with valid reasoning; Goes beyond surface by explaining the norm violation and causal mechanism; No self-monitoring or reflection on reasoning process; No verification or counterfactual checks; Presents answer confidently with minor hedging via 'folk-causal perspective' framing; Does not consider alternative interpretations (e.g., whether Alex also caused it since both chemicals were needed); Shows the reasoning chain clearly but skips consideration of joint causation
